name: pordee-pen-caveman
description: Auto Thai/English terse mode for Claude Code. Detects prompt language and switches between pordee (Thai) and caveman (English) per turn. ~60-75% fewer output tokens.

plugins.name: pordee-pen-caveman
plugins.description: พิมไทย → ตอบไทยกระชับ. Type English → terse English reply. Switches automatically per prompt.
